name: Mapbox
description: Mapbox provides location and mapping APIs for geocoding, directions, travel-time matrices, isochrone analysis, map matching, route optimization, static map images, styles, datasets, uploads, and token management.

capabilities.name: geocode_forward
capabilities.description: Convert a text address or place name into geographic coordinates. Returns ranked results.

capabilities.name: geocode_reverse
capabilities.description: Convert geographic coordinates into a human-readable address.

capabilities.name: geocode_batch
capabilities.description: Geocode up to 50 queries (forward, reverse, or structured) in a single request.

capabilities.name: directions_get
capabilities.description: Calculate turn-by-turn directions between coordinates for driving, walking, or cycling.

capabilities.name: matrix_get
capabilities.description: Compute travel time and distance matrices between multiple origins and destinations.

capabilities.name: isochrone_get
capabilities.description: Generate polygons showing areas reachable within a given travel time or distance from a point.

capabilities.name: map_matching_get
capabilities.description: Snap GPS trace coordinates to the road network and return the matched route.

capabilities.name: optimization_submit
capabilities.description: Submit a routing optimization problem (vehicle routing / TSP).

capabilities.name: optimization_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the solution for a previously submitted optimization problem.

capabilities.name: static_image_get
capabilities.description: Render a static map image as PNG for a given location, zoom, and dimensions.

capabilities.name: styles_list
capabilities.description: List all map styles for a user account.

capabilities.name: styles_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific map style document.

capabilities.name: styles_create
capabilities.description: Create a new map style.

capabilities.name: datasets_list
capabilities.description: List all datasets for a user account.

capabilities.name: datasets_create
capabilities.description: Create a new empty dataset.

capabilities.name: datasets_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about a specific dataset.

capabilities.name: datasets_features_list
capabilities.description: List all features in a dataset as GeoJSON.

capabilities.name: datasets_feature_put
capabilities.description: Insert or update a feature in a dataset.

capabilities.name: datasets_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a dataset.

capabilities.name: tokens_list
capabilities.description: List all access tokens for a user.

capabilities.name: tokens_create
capabilities.description: Create a new access token with specified scopes.

capabilities.name: uploads_create
capabilities.description: Create a new tileset upload from a staged file or existing dataset.

capabilities.name: uploads_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the status of a specific upload.
